office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A farmer and business owner emphasizing spending restraint faces a peer-support specialist running on rural health access and anti-lobbying commitments.

candidates.summary: Schmick is a former farmer and small-business owner focused on affordability, rural services, agriculture, and restraining state spending.
highlights: Says state spending has outpaced taxpayer income [S1]

taxes.basis: He supports returning excess state revenue to taxpayers.

spending.basis: He argues spending has outpaced incomes and favors returning excess revenue.

experience.basis: The dossier documents industry-board service but no elected office.

candidates.summary: Wallace is a peer-support specialist, trauma-recovery coach, caregiver, and civic educator emphasizing rural health access and political-money reform.
highlights: Pledges no corporate PAC or lobbyist donations [S1]

experience.basis: She brings service and lived experience but no documented elected record.

reform.basis: She explicitly rejects corporate PAC and lobbyist donations and targets the revolving door.

healthcare.basis: She prioritizes rural access without proposing a universal public system.
